plugins.name: comment-rule
plugins.description: Ships a UserPromptSubmit hook that prepends 'Remember the code commenting rule.' to every prompt, plus a skill containing the rule itself (when to comment, when not to). Keeps Claude's commenting discipline consistent across long sessions and after context compactions, without per-seat settings.json edits.

plugins.name: claude-ntfy
plugins.description: Push Claude Code completions to your phone via ntfy. The Stop hook sends what Claude actually said at turn-end (PR link / decision / error) instead of a static message; Notification events push permission/attention prompts. Auto-generates a private topic on first run with subscribe instructions. Cross-platform Node, no dependencies.
